rationale: Identifying name of the LLP at the top of the body. This form serves both domestic and foreign LLPs (FIRST captures the jurisdiction); entity.name is the canonical handle regardless. For foreign LLPs the value here is the home-jurisdiction name (no separate Maine-fictitious-name widget on this form).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its organization is
rationale: State or country where the LLP is organized. Same key as MLLP-12 / MLLC-12 (foreign-qualification forms). For domestic LLPs the value is 'Maine' or 'ME'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date the current year's annual report was filed
rationale: Date the prior (original) annual report being amended was filed. Namespaced under amendment.* to indicate it identifies the underlying filing being corrected (analogous role to entity.maine_authorization_date on cancellation forms — a metadata pointer to the prior SOS record).

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 1
label_verbatim: THIRD: The information has changed as follows (attach additional pages, if necessary): [line 1]
rationale: First of five inline text lines describing the substantive changes being filed. Multi-line widget composition mirrors MARK1's `mark.text_words.line{1,2}` and `mark.goods_or_services_description.line{1,2}` conventions: each physical AcroForm widget gets its own .lineN suffix so synth/filler can populate distinct widgets without collapsing them into a single canonical key.

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 2
rationale: Second line of the THIRD changes-description block.

widget_id: The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 3
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 4
The information has changed as follows attach additional pages if necessary 5
rationale: Fifth (last) inline line. Form text says 'attach additional pages, if necessary' for overflow beyond five lines; the attachment is a separate document, not a form widget.
Date on which the underlying information actually changed (semantically the 'effective date' of the change, distinct from filing.date_signed which is when the amendment is signed/filed).
Date of signature in the page-1 signature block.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
label_verbatim: Partner(s)* ... (signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Individual-partner signer printed name + capacity (Shape D, matches MLLP-9, MLLP-12, MLLC-12). Wet-ink (signature) line above has no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of the entity-partner when the signer is an entity rather than an individual. Same key as MLLP-9, MLLP-12A — parallel filer-level entity-signer block.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity_2
label_verbatim: For Partner(s) which are Entities — By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of the entity-partner. Same key as MLLP-9, MLLP-12A.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total enclosed fees. Page-0 header lists $85 (domestic LLP) or $150 (foreign LLP) base — fee depends on entity.home_jurisdiction (Maine vs not-Maine).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
